title: bouteloua barbata var. arenosa
intro: Bouteloua barbata var. arenosa, also known as sand bluestem, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its rich source of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Bouteloua barbata var. arenosa include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health conditions.
